summary: Completed comprehensive testing of IAM Refactor feature. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows working correctly including Roles page permission matrix, Users page with IAM fields, and sidebar navigation.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login returns new IAM structure with permissions
Backend: GET /api/roles returns exactly 3 system roles
Backend: Roles have permission matrix with all modules
Backend: Administrator has full permissions
Backend: Standard User has limited permissions
Backend: GET /api/roles/{id} returns specific role
Backend: PATCH /api/roles/{id} updates permissions
Backend: POST /api/roles/reset-defaults/{id} resets permissions
Backend: GET /api/roles/permissions/modules returns module definitions
Backend: GET /api/specialties returns list of specialties
Backend: POST /api/specialties creates new specialty
Backend: Duplicate specialty name returns 400
Backend: DELETE /api/specialties/{id} soft deletes
Backend: GET /api/access-tiers returns list of tiers
Backend: POST /api/access-tiers creates new tier
Backend: Duplicate tier name returns 400
Backend: DELETE /api/access-tiers/{id} soft deletes
Backend: GET /api/users returns users with IAM fields
Backend: POST /api/users creates user with IAM fields
Backend: Invalid role returns 400
Backend: PATCH /api/users/{id} updates role
Backend: User permission_overrides work correctly
Backend: GET /api/users/permissions/modules returns modules
Backend: GET /api/teams returns list of teams
Frontend: Roles page displays 3 system roles
Frontend: Role cards show user count and enabled permissions count
Frontend: Permission matrix shows collapsible modules
Frontend: Individual permission checkboxes are toggleable
Frontend: Module toggle switches work
Frontend: Save Changes button present
Frontend: Reset to Defaults button and dialog work
Frontend: Unsaved changes badge appears after toggle
Frontend: Users page displays all IAM columns (Role, Specialty, Team, Tier)
Frontend: Add User dialog has all IAM fields
Frontend: Edit User dialog opens without errors
Frontend: Specialty dropdown with 'Create new' option
Frontend: Access Tier dropdown with 'Create new' option
Frontend: Team dropdown selection works
Frontend: Permissions tab shows override toggle
Frontend: Enable permission overrides shows module list
Frontend: Sidebar shows all navigation items for Administrator
critical_code_review_comments: Roles.js: Well-structured permission matrix UI with collapsible modules and toggles
Users.js: Comprehensive user form with all IAM fields and inline creation for Specialty/Tier
roles.py: Proper validation of permission modules and actions
users.py: Effective permission calculation with role defaults + overrides
identity.py: Clean PERMISSION_MODULES and DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS structure
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed specialties, tiers, and users during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: IAM Refactor is fully functional. The platform now uses 3 fixed roles (Administrator, Privileged User, Standard User) with customizable permission matrices. Users have Team, Specialty, and Access Tier fields with inline creation capability. Per-user permission overrides are supported via the Permissions tab in user edit dialog. All route guards and navigation have been updated to use new role names.

roles_page.3_system_roles: WORKING - Administrator, Privileged User, Standard User
roles_page.module_toggles: WORKING - Switch to enable/disable all permissions in module
roles_page.reset_to_defaults: WORKING - Resets to default permissions with confirmation dialog

users_page.iam_columns: WORKING - Role, Specialty, Team, Tier columns displayed
users_page.permissions_tab: WORKING - Override toggle and module list

features_verified.sidebar_navigation: WORKING - All items visible for Administrator role

backend_apis.users_crud: WORKING - List, create, update, delete with IAM fields
